concerns.text: FR-003 requires inclusion of digital/finance access variables in the CSA index, but tasks.md (T022) explicitly states the index is built *exclusively* from agronomic practices. This is a direct conflict.
The plan states the CSA Index is constructed 'exclusively from agronomic practices', contradicting spec FR-003. This architectural decision is not authorized by the spec.
Task T025 implements Bonferroni correction as per the spec, but the plan authorizes Benjamini-Hochberg. This creates ambiguity and potential for incorrect implementation.
FR-010 requires a 'reduced-batch retry' on timeout, but the plan lacks details on this retry strategy, leaving the implementation unsupported.
No tasks are explicitly tagged to FR-004 (framing findings as associational). While likely covered in the analysis/reporting tasks, explicit tagging is missing.
No tasks are explicitly tagged to FR-005 (dataset size limit). While sampling is addressed in US1, the explicit requirement of FR-005 is not directly linked.
No tasks are explicitly tagged to FR-006 (Bonferroni correction). While T025 implements it, the link is not explicit.
No tasks are explicitly tagged to FR-007 (sensitivity analysis). While US3 mentions robustness checks, the specific requirement of FR-007 is not directly linked.
No tasks are explicitly tagged to FR-008 (regional maps). While US3 mentions maps, the link is not explicit.
No tasks are explicitly tagged to FR-009 (robustness checks). While US3 mentions robustness checks, the link is not explicit.
No tasks are explicitly tagged to FR-010 (timeout handling). While US2 mentions timeout handling, the link is not explicit.
No tasks are explicitly tagged to FR-011 (provenance logging). While US1 mentions provenance logging, the link is not explicit.
